channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Executes Alleged Israeli Agent Over Sabotage During Protests
item.description: Iran executed a man accused of acting as an Israeli agent and carrying out sabotage operations during nationwide protests. The execution highlights ongoing tensions between Iran and Israel.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Declared Cancer-Free After Hiding Diagnosis During Iran War
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu was declared cancer-free after concealing his diagnosis during the Iran conflict. The revelation raises questions about transparency during wartime.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Islamabad Residents Bear Cost of Pakistan US-Iran Mediation
item.description: As Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks, local residents face disruptions from a semi-lockdown in the capital. The mediation effort comes with significant costs to daily life and commerce in Islamabad.

item.title: ✈️ US Air Force Aims to Double F-15EX Eagle Fleet to 267 Aircraft
item.description: The US Air Force plans to boost F-15EX Eagle II inventory to 267 aircraft, doubling the original program size. The move reflects growing demand for advanced fighter capabilities amid global tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Greens Leader Slams Starmer Over 'Weaponizing' Antisemitism
item.description: UK Green Party co-leader Carla Denyer criticized Prime Minister Keir Starmer for what she called 'weaponizing' antisemitism after a parliamentary rebuke. The exchange highlights tensions over Middle East policy in British politics.

item.title: 🇵🇰 US Envoys Head to Pakistan for Iran Talks as Diplomatic Push Intensifies
item.description: Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Islamabad on Saturday for negotiations with Iranian officials, as both sides seek to de-escalate the ongoing conflict. Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi is also in Pakistan for the discussions.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Prepares for Prolonged Ukraine War With No Clear End Strategy
item.description: With US attention focused on Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a path to victory or negotiation. European leaders are bracing for a protracted conflict as American diplomatic resources shift elsewhere.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Sanctions Chinese Refinery for Buying Iranian Oil, Funding Military
item.description: The Treasury Department targeted Hengli refinery for generating hundreds of millions in revenue for Iran's military operations through illicit oil sales, stepping up enforcement of sanctions.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Palestinians vote in local elections across West Bank and Gaza
item.description: Local elections held in the occupied West Bank and one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not participating in what marks a rare electoral moment.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Europe pushes back at reported US threat to suspend Spain from NATO
item.description: NATO officials say there is no provision to expel members after an internal Pentagon email reportedly outlined options to punish allies over perceived lack of support for the Iran war.

item.title: 🏔️ Everest flood warning system abandoned, thousands at risk
item.description: A multi-million dollar flood warning system at Imja glacial lake near Everest has not been maintained since 2016, leaving local communities vulnerable to outburst floods.

item.title: 🚗 Chinese EV giant BYD says it can thrive without US market
item.description: Chinas largest electric vehicle manufacturer positions itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels as fuel prices rise and geopolitical tensions shape trade.

item.title: 🚢 Pirates hijack oil tanker off Somalia coast
item.description: Piracy in the Indian Ocean has made a comeback in recent years, with a vessel seized in a region once notorious for maritime attacks.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Rules Out Direct US Talks as Envoys Head to Pakistan
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad but Iranian officials say there will be no direct negotiations with Washington, despite US envoys Witkoff and Kushner also traveling to Pakistan for potential indirect talks.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Deploying Warships to Mediterranean for Possible Hormuz Mission
item.description: German navy vessels are being sent to the Mediterranean as Berlin considers a potential role in protecting shipping through the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran attacks on commercial vessels.

item.title: ⚓ Three US Aircraft Carriers Now Operating in Middle East
item.description: For the first time since 2003, three US carrier strike groups are operating in Central Command's area of responsibility as the US military buildup around Iran continues.

item.title: 🤖 Ukraine to Field 25,000 Ground Robots for Frontline Logistics
item.description: Ukraines military plans to deploy 25,000 unmanned ground vehicles to replace soldiers in dangerous logistics missions. Ground robots ran more than 9,000 frontline missions in March, triple Novembers count.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Signs Cooperation Deals During First Wartime Visit to Azerbaijan
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Azerbaijan for talks with Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev, signing cooperation agreements in his first wartime visit to the Caucasus nation.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Seven Dead as Russian Strike Hits Residential Building in Dnipro
item.description: A major Russian attack on Ukraine killed at least seven people, with the city of Dnipro hardest hit after a strike on a residential building. Four deaths were reported from the Dnipro attack alone.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Mali Army Reports Coordinated Armed Group Attacks Across Country
item.description: Mali's military says armed groups have launched coordinated attacks across the country, with witnesses reporting explosions and sustained gunfire near a military base outside the capital, Bamako.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO Chief Says No Provision to Expel Members After US Threat Report
item.description: NATO's secretary general responded to reports that the US could seek to suspend Spain over perceived lack of support for the Iran war, stating there is "no provision" in the alliance's treaty to expel members.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Affirms Falklands Sovereignty After Reported US Review
item.description: British Prime Minister's office stated that Falklands sovereignty rests with the UK following reports of a Pentagon document raising the prospect of a change in US position in retaliation for Britain not joining the Iran war.

item.title: 💰 US Sanctions China-Based Oil Refinery and 40 Shippers Over Iranian Oil
item.description: The US Treasury Department imposed sanctions on a China-based oil refinery and 40 shipping companies for handling Iranian oil, escalating economic pressure on Tehran amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Treated for Early-Stage Prostate Cancer
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu underwent surgery to remove a malignant tumor and says he is in "excellent physical condition." The 76-year-old leader continues to face domestic political pressures while managing Israels role in the regional conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Key Tadamon Massacre Suspect Arrested in Syria
item.description: Amjad Youssef, wanted for the mass killing of blindfolded civilians during the Syrian civil war in April 2013, has been arrested. The notorious Tadamon massacre video showed victims being executed in the Damascus district.
